study_title: Several species of phasmatodea, with a separate transcriptome set for each. Species: Aretaon asperrimus (Heteropterigidae), Sipyloidea sipylus (Diapheromeridae), and Medauroidea extradentata, Extatosoma tiaratum, and Ramulus artemis (Phasmatidae). Tr
design: The  midgut of the honeybee was dissected and the RNA was extracted using the TRIzol protocol. The barcoded library was generated using the Illumina TruSeq RNA kit and sequenced on one lane (along with the other libraries generated in this project). Paired-end sequencing was used. Each pair of files included here refers to the forward (1) and reverse (2) reads.
sample_description: Used to compare transcript number to genome number, see associated Phasmatodea data.
